basics.name: Md. Latiful Kabir
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: I'm a full-stack software engineer who works across the JavaScript and Python ecosystems. Most of my day-to-day involves building with React, Next.js, and TypeScript on the frontend, and Node.js or FastAPI on the backend — depending on what the project calls for. I've spent a good amount of time working with authentication flows, particularly OAuth 2.0 and JWT-based systems, and I genuinely enjoy getting those right. On the data side, I work with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and MySQL, usually through ORMs like Prisma or Drizzle. I've built products that serve tens of thousands of users, and more recently I've been working on AI-powered tools and third-party integrations. I started out writing C and Java, picked up the web stack along the way, and I'm currently exploring Rust and Go when I get the chance. I care about writing clean, practical code that actually solves problems — not just code that looks impressive.

education.studyType: B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)

work.name: FlowGenX AI
work.summary: FlowGenX AI is an agentic AI platform designed for enterprise integration and automation. The platform enables businesses to deploy intelligent AI agents that orchestrate complex workflows and integrate with various systems, featuring multi-agent coordination, universal API connectivity, knowledge base management, and enterprise-grade security.
highlights: Building and developing connectors for third-party integrations including Google Sheets, Google Ads, Meta Ads, PayPal, Dropbox, Google Pub/Sub, Airtable, and more to enable seamless enterprise automation workflows.
Maintaining and enhancing the core platform built with Next.js, ensuring stability, performance, and scalability.
Identifying and resolving bugs and issues across the platform to improve reliability and user experience.
Implementing new features and enhancements to expand platform capabilities and meet evolving business requirements.

work.name: Affpilot AI
work.summary: Affpilot AI is an AI-powered content creation tool designed for bloggers and marketers to automate the generation of SEO-optimized articles, product reviews, and other content. Key features include bulk article generation (up to 1,000 articles in one click), auto-posting capabilities for WordPress and Blogger, and advanced SEO tools for keyword research and grouping. The platform offers specialized generators for various content types, such as Amazon review articles, biography articles, comparison articles, and informational articles. It also provides tools for content optimization like paragraph rewriting, sentence correction, and FAQ generation.
highlights: Spearheading development of the Affpilot AI platform — an AI-powered content automation system with over 90,000+ global users.
Leading front-end initiatives using React.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, ensuring seamless scalability and performance.
Built interactive dashboards for bulk content generation, SEO automation, and one-click publishing to WordPress/Blogger.
Integrated RESTful APIs for content generation, keyword analysis, and real-time job tracking.
Collaborated cross-functionally for the AppSumo global launch, enhancing onboarding flow and multilingual UI/UX.
Improved code modularity and component reusability, reducing front-end code redundancy by 25%.

work.name: AdsPillar (PlanPost AI)
work.summary: PlanPost AI is an AI marketing assistant that helps users create content, ads, and manage SEO. It offers features such as generating 30 days of social media posts, ad copy, graphics, and videos in seconds. Key functionalities include a bulk social media post generator, a free online graphic design tool, an AI ad creative generator, and an AI agent chatbot for customer engagement. The platform aims to save time, reduce costs, and help businesses grow faster by streamlining content creation and ad campaign management.
highlights: Contributed to PlanPost AI, an AI-driven social media content creation and scheduling platform.
Developed backend APIs with Python (FastAPI) and crafted responsive UIs using React.js.
Designed and launched Canvas, a manual graphics design tool inspired by Figma/Canva.
Integrated AI-assisted media rendering workflows and implemented scalable client-server communication models.
Enhanced backend performance, reducing API latency by 40%.
work.location: Begum Rokeya Sarani, Mirpur, Dhaka, Bangladesh

work.name: AdsPillar
work.summary: Supported full-stack development of internal projects using React.js, Node.js, and Python. Participated in Agile sprints, performed debugging, and contributed to QA testing pipelines. Assisted in integrating third-party APIs and improving code efficiency through refactoring.
highlights: Supported full-stack development of internal projects using React.js, Node.js, and Python.
Participated in Agile sprints, performed debugging, and contributed to QA testing pipelines.
Assisted in integrating third-party APIs and improving code efficiency through refactoring.
work.location: Begum Rokeya Sarani, Mirpur, Dhaka, Bangladesh

projects.name: Doetra — AI SEO Article Generator
projects.description: Full-stack AI SaaS, built end-to-end as a solo developer, that generates SEO-optimized product review and informational articles with auto-generated images and one-click WordPress publishing. Live app at app.doetra.com with a Next.js marketing site at doetra.com.
highlights: Five article generation flows: product Roundup reviews, Info (educational) articles, Outline-to-Article, plus bulk Roundup and bulk Info batch jobs with queue-based async processing and live status tracking.
AI text generation via OpenAI gpt-4o-mini; AI image generation via Together AI's Flux Schnell (black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell) for featured images and up to 3 inline section images per article.
Live Amazon Creators API integration across 31 search indexes with in-stock filtering and per-site Amazon affiliate tag management.

Full WordPress integration supporting publish, schedule, and draft statuses, categories, featured images, and inline image uploads via the /wp-json/wp/v2 REST API. WordPress credentials encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.

Dual authentication: Google OAuth (@react-oauth/google on frontend, google-auth-library on backend) plus email/password with verification codes and password reset; JWT access tokens (15m) + refresh tokens (7d) in httpOnly cookies.
Abuse protection: Fingerprint.js device fingerprinting on signup, Redis-backed per-endpoint rate limiting (login, register, generate, bulk), Helmet security headers, and a CORS allow-list.
Frontend: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + Redux Toolkit + Tailwind + Radix UI + Tiptap 3.20 rich-text editor with an AI-powered internal linking service between articles.

Admin panel covering user management, article moderation, API usage audit, bulk job monitoring, plan and credit-pack CRUD, an internal blog CMS, and an email campaign builder with reusable templates, variable substitution, and per-plan user targeting.

Billing via Stripe: subscription plans and one-time credit packs with signed webhooks, and configurable per-article-type credit costs (roundup, info, outline, per extra image) editable live from the admin dashboard.
Transactional email via Nodemailer + Hostinger SMTP for signup verification, password reset, and Stripe-webhook-triggered order confirmations.

Backend: Node.js + Express + MongoDB/Mongoose + Redis caching (24-hour TTL on Amazon search results), running in PM2 cluster mode (2 instances, 1 GB max memory) with Vercel-compatible serverless detection.

projects.name: al-quran-client-site
projects.description: A web application for reading the Quran, with features like advanced search, multiple translations, audio recitations, and customizable themes.
highlights: Comprehensive Browsing: Navigate the Quran by Surah, Juz, Hizb, Manzil, Ruku, Sajda, and Page.
Advanced Search: Quickly find verses with a powerful and intuitive search functionality.
Multiple Translations: Compare and understand verses with multiple translations side-by-side.
Audio Recitations: Listen to beautiful recitations of each verse.
Customizable Themes: Switch between light and dark modes for a comfortable reading experience.
Responsive Design: Enjoy a seamless experience on any device, from desktops to mobile phones.
Elegant UI: A clean and modern user interface built with Shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.
State Management: Efficient and predictable state management with Redux Toolkit.

projects.name: hadith_explorer
projects.description: A modern, fully responsive web application for exploring authentic Islamic Hadiths in Arabic, English, and Urdu.
highlights: Access 9 major Hadith collections including Sahih Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, Jami' Al-Tirmidhi, Sunan Abu Dawood, Sunan Ibn-e-Majah, Sunan An-Nasa'i, Mishkat Al-Masabih, Musnad Ahmad, and Al-Silsila Sahiha.
Search Hadiths by text in English, Arabic, or Urdu with real-time results and pagination.
Filter by book collection and authenticity status (Sahih, Hasan, Da'eef).
Browse chapters within each book with multilingual chapter titles.
View complete Hadith texts and narrator chains in all supported languages with RTL support for Arabic and Urdu.
Fully Responsive Design: Optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop with touch-friendly navigation.
Light & Dark Mode: Seamless theme switching with system preference detection and persistent user choice.
Clean & Elegant UI: Built with shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS, and smooth transitions for an enhanced user experience.

projects.name: islamic-prayer-times
projects.description: A comprehensive web application providing accurate Islamic prayer times, fasting schedules, Qibla direction, and Hijri calendar conversion for Muslims worldwide.
highlights: Accurate prayer time calculations for Fajr, Sunrise, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha with real-time countdown and progress indicators, supporting 12 different calculation methods and Shafi/Hanafi madhab options.
Fasting schedule with Sahur and Iftar times, countdown timers, fasting duration calculation, and Ramadan awareness features.
Qibla direction finder with precise calculation based on user location, interactive compass, and distance to Makkah.
Hijri calendar with Gregorian to Hijri date conversion, Arabic/English display, and White Days (Ayyam Al-Beed) tracker.
Privacy-focused design with all calculations performed locally on the device — no data sent to external servers.
Built with React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, and Radix UI with Dark/Light/System theme support.

projects.name: react_canvas
projects.description: A feature-rich drawing and design tool built with React, inspired by Figma and Canva.
highlights: Extensive collection of shapes: Basic shapes (rectangles, circles, triangles, polygons), Rounded shapes with customizable corners, Custom SVG shapes and icons, Text elements with over 40 font options, Rich icon library with various categories, Image upload and integration capabilities.

Full responsive behavior for desktop and mobile devices, Adaptive UI that adjusts to screen size, Touch and mouse interaction support, Optimized mobile experience with proper event handling, Panel auto-collapsing on small screens.

Layer management and object organization, Grouping and ungrouping of multiple objects, Object locking and selection tools, Canvas export functionality with multiple formats, Object duplication and cloning.

projects.name: islamic_card_designer
projects.description: Browser-based design tool for creating customizable Islamic greeting cards, inspired by Figma and Canva.
highlights: 80+ pre-built templates for Eid ul-Fitr, Eid ul-Adha, Ramadan, Milad-un-Nabi, and other Islamic occasions, organized by style (Minimal, Floral, Geometric, Calligraphy).
Fabric.js-powered canvas editor with 15 aspect ratio presets, smart snapping guides, 10%–500% zoom, and 50-state undo/redo.
60+ geometric shapes, 300+ Lucide icons with real-time search, and a 20+ category asset library (mosques, lanterns, patterns, calligraphy).
Rich text editing with 49 Google Fonts via WebFontLoader; image filters including sepia, blur, grayscale, and duotone.
High-resolution export from HD (1280×720) up to 5K (5120×2880) in PNG, JPEG, and WebP.
Built with React 18 + Context API + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui, optimized with lazy-loaded panels, virtualized asset grids, and code-split bundles.

projects.name: islamic-prophets-stories
projects.description: Interactive app exploring the stories of the 25 Prophets of Islam, with verified references from the Quran, Ibn Kathir's Stories of the Prophets, and Sahih Hadith collections.
highlights: Complete prophet narratives with authenticated source citations.
Quranic passages presented in Arabic alongside English translations.
Tri-lingual support: English, Bengali, and Arabic.
Dark/light theme, reading progress tracking, and bookmarks.
Full-content search and a historical timeline view.
Kids mode with simplified stories and quizzes.
Ships as both a Progressive Web App and a native Android app via Capacitor 7; built with React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 7 + Zustand + Radix UI.
